nodes.title: Introduction to DevOps & CI/CD
nodes.rationale: Understanding the core principles of DevOps and CI/CD is fundamental before diving into specific tools like Kubernetes, as it provides the 'why' behind the practices.

nodes.title: Version Control with Git
nodes.rationale: Git is the industry standard for version control and is an absolute prerequisite for any CI/CD pipeline, as it manages the source code that pipelines operate on.
suggested_micro_topics: Git basic commands (add, commit, push, pull)

nodes.title: Containerization with Docker
nodes.rationale: Kubernetes orchestrates containers, so a solid understanding of Docker and containerization concepts is essential before learning Kubernetes itself.

nodes.title: Kubernetes Core Concepts
nodes.rationale: This module establishes the foundational knowledge of Kubernetes, which is critical for orchestrating applications and building CI/CD pipelines on it.

nodes.title: CI/CD Pipeline Tools & Concepts
nodes.rationale: Beyond the theoretical understanding of CI/CD, this module introduces the practical tools and concepts used to build and manage pipelines, which is directly relevant to securing a CI/CD job.

nodes.title: CI/CD Integration with Kubernetes
nodes.rationale: This module directly addresses the user's goal of getting a CI/CD job by focusing on how to integrate CI/CD pipelines with Kubernetes for automated deployments.
suggested_micro_topics: Deploying applications to Kubernetes via CI/CD
Image building and pushing to registry in pipeline
Secrets management in CI/CD for Kubernetes
GitOps principles (Argo CD, Flux CD introduction)

nodes.title: Helm for Kubernetes Package Management
nodes.rationale: Helm is a crucial tool for packaging and deploying applications on Kubernetes, making it an essential skill for managing complex CI/CD deployments.

nodes.title: Monitoring & Logging in Kubernetes
nodes.rationale: Effective monitoring and logging are critical for maintaining the health and performance of applications deployed via CI/CD on Kubernetes, and for troubleshooting pipeline issues.

nodes.title: Security in Kubernetes CI/CD
nodes.rationale: Security is paramount in any production environment. Understanding how to secure Kubernetes deployments and CI/CD pipelines is vital for a robust and reliable system.

nodes.title: Building a Complete Kubernetes CI/CD Pipeline (Project)
nodes.rationale: This capstone project integrates all learned concepts into a practical application, providing hands-on experience crucial for demonstrating skills for a CI/CD job.
